meta.pageTitle: Elite Strikers Football Academy | Building Tomorrow's Football Champions
meta.metaDescription: Elite Strikers Football Academy offers professional football training programs for ages 6-18, including youth development, goalkeeper training, and fitness & conditioning.
meta.metaKeywords: football academy, soccer training, youth football, goalkeeper training, fitness conditioning, Elite Strikers

hero.title: Building Tomorrow's Football Champions
hero.subtitle: World-class coaching, modern facilities, and a winning culture designed to help young players unlock their full potential on and off the pitch.

about.title: About Elite Strikers
about.paragraph1: Elite Strikers Football Academy is dedicated to nurturing the next generation of football talent through structured, age-appropriate training programs. Our philosophy blends technical excellence, tactical awareness, and strong character development.
about.paragraph2: Our mission is to create a positive, high-performance environment where every player can grow with confidence, discipline, and passion for the beautiful game.
pills: Focus on both skills and sportsmanship

programs.title: Training Programs
programs.intro: Tailored programs designed to support players at every stage of their football journey, from first touch to professional preparation.

cards.title: Youth Development (Ages 6-12)
cards.description: Fun, engaging sessions focused on mastering the fundamentals — dribbling, passing, coordination, and a love for the game.

cards.title: Professional Training (Ages 13-18)
cards.description: High-intensity drills and tactical sessions that mirror professional environments for ambitious young players.

cards.title: Goalkeeper Training
cards.description: Specialist training for keepers focusing on reflexes, positioning, distribution, and leadership from the back.

cards.title: Fitness & Conditioning
cards.description: Football-specific strength, agility, and endurance training to keep players sharp, resilient, and injury-free.

whyUs.title: Why Choose Elite Strikers?
whyUs.intro: We combine elite-level coaching, cutting-edge facilities, and a player-first mindset to deliver an unmatched academy experience.

features.title: Certified Coaches
features.description: Our coaching team holds top-level certifications and experience at professional and international levels.

features.title: Modern Facilities
features.description: Train on high-quality pitches with professional-grade equipment, video analysis tools, and recovery areas.

features.title: Player Development Focus
features.description: We track progress over time, providing individualized feedback and development plans for each player.

features.title: Family-Oriented Culture
features.description: Transparent communication and regular updates keep parents involved in every step of their child's journey.

coaches.title: Coaching Staff
coaches.intro: Meet the leaders shaping the next generation of football talent with expertise, passion, and care.

list.name: Coach Daniel Reyes
list.bio: UEFA A-licensed coach with over 12 years of experience in youth academies across Europe, specializing in attacking football and player development.

list.name: Coach Aisha Khan
list.bio: Certified strength and conditioning specialist focused on building strong, fast, and resilient athletes through science-backed training.

list.name: Coach Marco Silva
list.bio: Former professional goalkeeper with a proven track record of developing confident, commanding keepers at academy and senior levels.

enroll.title: Enroll Your Player
enroll.intro: Complete the form to submit an enrollment request. Our team will review your details and contact you with available training slots and next steps.
listItems: Flexible weekday and weekend training options

footer.copyrightText: Elite Strikers Football Academy. All rights reserved.
